[Music]

careful to avoid the mths of hungry sea

the bag will travel hundreds of miles to
join the thriving community of plastic
known as the Great Pacific Garbage Patch
the garbage patch is a veritable plastic
Oasis where millions of tons of plastic
garbage remain trapped by the currents
it is said to be twice the size of Texas
never actually biodegrading here the
plastic bag can live indefinitely
peacefully coexisting with billions of
other petroleum species before breaking
into ever tinier plastic pieces thus
completing the plastic cycle of life
